snippet.title: Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer | Pawan Kalyan | Harish Shankar | Sreeleela | Raashii Khanna
snippet.description:
Ustaad Bhagat Singh Trailer on @MythriMovieMakers 

Ustaad Bhagat Singh is an Upcoming 2026 Telugu movie ft. Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna & others. Music composed by Rockstar Devi Sri Prasad, Written and Directed by Harish Shankar.S. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers Banner.

In Cinemas March 19th, 2026.

#UstaadBhagatSinghTrailer #UstaadBhagatSingh #PawanKalyan #HarishShankar #Sreeleela #RaashiiKhanna #DeviSriPrasad #DSP #NaveenYerneni #RaviShankar #MythriMovieMakers

Cast: Pawan Kalyan, Sreeleela, Raashii Khanna, Parthiban & Others

Technical Crew:

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | SURVIVAL STAGE | Day 1 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The SURVIVAL STAGE begins.

After the Semi Finals, the bottom 16 teams get one final opportunity to fight their way back into contention. There are no easy games now. Every match carries everything.

Only the Top 8 teams from the Survival Stage will secure their place in the GRAND FINALS.

One more chance. One more run. No room for mistakes.

Watch the Survival Stage live and see who keeps their championship hopes alive.

Follow us on Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/kraftonindiaesports/
Follow us on X: https://x.com/KIEOFFICIAL_
Join our official Discord server: https://discord.gg/P53etCn5ve

#BGIS2026 #BreakingBoundaries #BGMILIVE #KraftonIndiaEsports #BGMI

snippet.description:

----------------------------------------------
#KD #KDTHEDEVIL #sarseninnaseragasarse #norafatehi #prems  #aishwaryarangarajan #rajusundaram  #KVNProductions #jogiprem #kannadanewsong  #kdmoviesong #kannadamoviesongs #reeshmananaiah #dhruvasarja #trending #prems #dance #newsong #hindisong #jogiprem #kdthirdsingle #kdsong #arjunjanya #shilpashetty #ramesharavind #telugu #shivashiva #vravichandran #showmanprem #youtube #anandaudio

Hey‚Ä¶ Mai Mele Seere Nilluthilla Yaakoo..
Hey‚Ä¶ Nerige Hididu Nillisonu Beku‚Ä¶
Seragyaako‚Ä¶. Jaarutthide‚Ä¶..
Sarasakke Seerenu Sariyutthayide‚Ä¶.
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
..................‚Ä¶ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Melatthi Kelage Ilsi, Thottikkadang Olage Ilsi
Olag Hogi Horage Bandre Khaali.. Ellaa Khaali Khaali
Maimyaalanthru Challabyadrappa Bejaaraytthade‚Ä¶
Maneg Hodre Nimma Guttu Rattaagoythade‚Ä¶

Ille Nekkendu Hogbudi, Ille Orsbudi
Kaiyal Baatlanthu Manevargo Thakkond Hogbedi..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
.................‚Ä¶ Khalnayak Hoon Main..

Meese Hotthorigella, Naanond Queshion Kel.la
Maneli Ella Idru Yaake‚Ä¶ Nimge Nande Beke‚Ä¶
Thumba Costly Antha Bejaar Maadkobedrappa..
Aladhu Thoogi Thooka Haaki Nodi Kodrappa..

Mettha Metthagirthade Mutthindange Sorthade
Baayigitre Uppina Kaayi Becchagaaythade..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
Sarse Sarse Ninna Seraga Sarse..
........................... Khalnayak Hoon Main..
-------------------------------

snippet.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
snippet.description:
Brandon and Michael check out the adrenaline-pumping trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the next chapter in the high-octane spy-action franchise helmed by Aditya Dhar. Packed with gritty visuals and relentless pacing, the trailer hints at a darker, more personal mission fueled by revenge, layered with political tension and cross-border conflict. From explosive set pieces to intense face-offs, this sequel looks ready to raise the stakes and deliver a hard-hitting cinematic experience. 

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SanjayDutt #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

id.title: Reaksi Trailer DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dar
id.description:
Brandon dan Michael menonton trailer menegangkan Dhurandhar: The Revenge, babak selanjutnya dalam franchise aksi mata-mata berkecepatan tinggi yang disutradarai oleh Aditya Dhar. Dipenuhi dengan visual yang keras dan tempo yang tanpa henti, trailer ini mengisyaratkan misi yang lebih gelap dan personal yang didorong oleh balas dendam, dibumbui dengan ketegangan politik dan konflik lintas batas. Dari adegan-adegan eksplosif hingga konfrontasi yang intens, sekuel ini tampak siap untuk meningkatkan taruhan dan memberikan pengalaman sinematik yang dahsyat.

Film ini menampilkan deretan pemain hebat yang dipimpin oleh Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), bersama Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), dan Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), semuanya menghadirkan intensitas dan kedalaman pada film thriller mata-mata yang menegangkan ini. Trailer menjanjikan aksi yang luar biasa, pertaruhan emosional, dan cerita yang dipenuhi dengan balas dendam dan patriotisme.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #ReaksiTrailer #ReaksiBollywood #SanjayDutt #ThrillerMataMata #SinemaIndia

nl-NL.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailerreactie! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
nl-NL.description:
Brandon en Michael bekijken de adrenalineverhogende trailer van Dhurandhar: The Revenge, het volgende hoofdstuk in de enerverende spionage-actiefilmreeks onder leiding van Aditya Dhar. De trailer zit vol rauwe beelden en een razend tempo, en hint naar een duistere, meer persoonlijke missie gedreven door wraak, vermengd met politieke spanning en grensoverschrijdende conflicten. Van explosieve actiesc√®nes tot intense confrontaties, deze sequel lijkt klaar om de lat hoger te leggen en een keiharde filmervaring te leveren.

De film heeft een ijzersterke cast onder leiding van Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), samen met Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border) en Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam). Zij brengen allemaal intensiteit en diepgang in deze rauwe spionagethriller. De trailer belooft spectaculaire actie, emotionele spanning en een verhaal vol wraak en patriottisme.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReactie #BollywoodReactie #SanjayDutt #Spionagethriller #IndiaseCinema

en.title: DHURANDHAR THE REVENGE Trailer Reaction! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Aditya Dhar
en.description:
Brandon and Michael check out the adrenaline-pumping trailer of Dhurandhar: The Revenge, the next chapter in the high-octane spy-action franchise helmed by Aditya Dhar. Packed with gritty visuals and relentless pacing, the trailer hints at a darker, more personal mission fueled by revenge, layered with political tension and cross-border conflict. From explosive set pieces to intense face-offs, this sequel looks ready to raise the stakes and deliver a hard-hitting cinematic experience. 

The film features a powerhouse cast led by Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), alongside Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border), and Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), all bringing intensity and depth to this gritty espionage thriller. The trailer promises larger-than-life action, emotional stakes, and a story fueled by revenge and patriotism.

#DhurandharTheRevenge #RanveerSingh #TrailerReaction #BollywoodReaction #SanjayDutt #SpyThriller #IndianCinema

it.title: DHURANDHAR LA VENDETTA Reazione del trailer! | Ranveer Singh | Arjun Rampal | Sanjay Dutt | Adity...
it.description:
Brandon e Michael guardano l'adrenalinico trailer di Dhurandhar: The Revenge, il nuovo capitolo dell'adrenalinica saga di spionaggio e azione diretta da Aditya Dhar. Ricco di immagini crude e dal ritmo incalzante, il trailer lascia presagire una missione pi√Ļ oscura e personale, alimentata dalla vendetta, intrisa di tensioni politiche e conflitti transfrontalieri. Tra sequenze d'azione esplosive e intensi scontri, questo sequel sembra pronto ad alzare la posta in gioco e a offrire un'esperienza cinematografica di grande impatto.

Il film vanta un cast stellare guidato da Ranveer Singh (Padmaavat, Gully Boy, Bajirao Mastani), affiancato da Sanjay Dutt (KGF: Chapter 2, Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.), R. Madhavan (Rocketry: The Nambi Effect, 3 Idiots), Arjun Rampal (Ra.One, Om Shanti Om), Akshaye Khanna (Drishyam 2, Border) e Sara Arjun (Deiva Thirumagal, Saivam), tutti in grado di conferire intensit√† e profondit√† a questo crudo thriller di spionaggio. Il trailer promette azione epica, tensione emotiva e una storia alimentata da vendetta e patriottismo.

ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶® ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Üŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶ßŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶á-ŗ¶Öŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶üŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶á-ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶® ŗ¶ęŗßćŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶öŗ¶ĺŗ¶áŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶§ŗßÄ ŗ¶Öŗ¶ßŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ‚Äėŗ¶ßŗßĀŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶į: ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶≠ŗßáŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶ú‚Äô-ŗ¶Źŗ¶į ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶°ŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņŗ¶®-ŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Ėŗßá ŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ ŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶Öŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģ ŗ¶óŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶≠ŗ¶įŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßčŗ¶ßŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶Üŗ¶óŗßĀŗ¶®ŗßá ŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶ďŗ¶†ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ē ŗ¶Öŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶ßŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶ď ŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶óŗ¶§ ŗ¶ģŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶áŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶®ŗßąŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶Čŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶§ŗßáŗ¶úŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶Üŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Éŗ¶łŗßÄŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶łŗ¶āŗ¶ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶™ŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶£ŗ•§ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶ęŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶ē ŗ¶łŗßáŗ¶ü ŗ¶™ŗ¶Ņŗ¶ł ŗ¶•ŗßáŗ¶ēŗßá ŗ¶∂ŗßĀŗ¶įŗßĀ ŗ¶ēŗ¶įŗßá ŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶į ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶Ėŗßčŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶Ėŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶≤ŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶á ŗ¶™ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§, ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ĮŗßĀŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ĚŗßĀŗ¶Āŗ¶ēŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶°ŗ¶ľŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßá ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶úŗßčŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßč ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶ē ŗ¶Öŗ¶≠ŗ¶Ņŗ¶úŗßćŗ¶ěŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Čŗ¶™ŗ¶Ļŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗ¶¶ŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶§ŗßĀŗ¶§ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶≤ŗßá ŗ¶ģŗ¶®ŗßá ŗ¶Ļŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶õŗßáŗ•§

ŗ¶õŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶įŗ¶£ŗ¶¨ŗßÄŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶Ņŗ¶ā (ŗ¶™ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗ¶§, ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ď ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗ¶Ņ)-ŗ¶Źŗ¶į ŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶§ŗßÉŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶¨ŗßá ŗ¶Źŗ¶ē ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßÄ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶łŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶∂ ŗ¶įŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ•§ ŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺŗ¶Āŗ¶į ŗ¶łŗ¶ôŗßćŗ¶óŗßá ŗ¶Üŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗ¶ěŗßćŗ¶úŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶¶ŗ¶§ŗßćŗ¶§ (ŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶úŗ¶Ņŗ¶Źŗ¶ę: ŗ¶öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶üŗ¶ĺŗ¶į ŗß®, ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶≠ŗ¶ĺŗ¶á ŗ¶Źŗ¶ģ.ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ.ŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ.ŗ¶Źŗ¶ł.), ŗ¶Üŗ¶į. ŗ¶ģŗ¶ĺŗ¶ßŗ¶¨ŗ¶® (ŗ¶įŗ¶ēŗßáŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ: ŗ¶¶ŗßćŗ¶Į ŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗßćŗ¶¨ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶Źŗ¶ęŗßáŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶ü, ŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶áŗ¶°ŗ¶Ņŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶üŗ¶ł), ŗ¶Öŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶úŗßĀŗ¶® ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ģŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ (ŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ.ŗ¶ďŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ¶ĺŗ¶®, ŗ¶ďŗ¶ģ ŗ¶∂ŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶ďŗ¶ģ), ŗ¶Öŗ¶ēŗßćŗ¶∑ŗ¶Įŗ¶ľ ŗ¶Ėŗ¶ĺŗ¶®ŗßćŗ¶®ŗ¶ĺ (ŗ¶¶ŗßÉŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ģ ŗß®, ŗ¶¨ŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶°ŗ¶ĺŗ¶į) ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶łŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Öŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶úŗßĀŗ¶® (ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶¨ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶•ŗ¶Ņŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶ģŗ¶óŗ¶≤, ŗ¶∂ŗßąŗ¶¨ŗ¶ģ)ŗ•§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶Āŗ¶įŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶łŗ¶ēŗ¶≤ŗßáŗ¶á ŗ¶Źŗ¶á ŗ¶ēŗ¶†ŗ¶Ņŗ¶® ŗ¶łŗßćŗ¶™ŗ¶ĺŗ¶á ŗ¶•ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶Ņŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņŗ¶§ŗßá ŗ¶§ŗßÄŗ¶¨ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶ď ŗ¶óŗ¶≠ŗßÄŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶ĺ ŗ¶Źŗ¶®ŗßáŗ¶õŗßáŗ¶®ŗ•§ ŗ¶üŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶≤ŗ¶ĺŗ¶įŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶úŗ¶ģŗ¶ēŗ¶ĺŗ¶≤ŗßč ŗ¶Öŗßćŗ¶Įŗ¶ĺŗ¶ēŗ¶∂ŗ¶®, ŗ¶Üŗ¶¨ŗßáŗ¶óŗ¶ėŗ¶® ŗ¶ģŗßĀŗ¶Ļŗßāŗ¶įŗßćŗ¶§ ŗ¶Źŗ¶¨ŗ¶ā ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßčŗ¶ß ŗ¶ď ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶∂ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗßáŗ¶ģŗßá ŗ¶≠ŗ¶įŗ¶™ŗßĀŗ¶į ŗ¶Źŗ¶ēŗ¶üŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶óŗ¶≤ŗßćŗ¶™ŗßáŗ¶į ŗ¶™ŗßćŗ¶įŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņŗ¶∂ŗßćŗ¶įŗßĀŗ¶§ŗ¶Ņ ŗ¶¶ŗßáŗ¶Įŗ¶ľŗ•§

snippet.title: BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
BTS: THE RETURN, a Netflix Documentary. Follow the long-awaited comeback of pop royalty, BTS. Get unprecedented access to the seven members‚Äô journey of doubt, laughter, and rediscovery as they return to the studio, create new music, and begin the comeback of the decade! From acclaimed director Bao Nguyen (The Stringer, The Greatest Night in Pop) and producers This Machine (Martha, Karol G) and HYBE.

BTS: The Return - Only on Netflix, March 27

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/82158609

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world‚Äôs leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

BTS: THE RETURN | Documentary | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

They're back! BTS gathers in LA to record their album "Arirang" in this documentary offering unprecedented access to the band as they enter a new era.

snippet.title: Outcome ‚ÄĒ Official Trailer | Apple TV
snippet.description:
Keanu Reeves is Hollywood‚Äôs biggest star, Reef Hawk.

Outcome ‚ÄĒ A new film by Jonah Hill, starring Keanu Reeves, Cameron Diaz, Matt Bomer and Hill.

Coming April 10 to Apple TV.
https://apple.co/_Outcome

‚ÄúOutcome‚ÄĚ is a dark comedy that centers on Reef Hawk (Reeves), a beloved Hollywood star who must dive into the depths of his hidden demons after he is extorted with a mysterious video that‚Äôs sure to shatter his image and end his career. With the support of his lifelong besties, Kyle (Diaz) and Xander (Bomer), along with his crisis lawyer, Ira (Hill), Reef embarks on a soul-searching journey to make amends with anyone he could have possibly wronged in hopes of identifying the blackmailer. Co-writer and director Hill brings a unique lens to Reef‚Äôs wild but spiritually cleansing, nostalgic and eye-opening trip down memory lane, where confronting his past might be the only way to rescue his future.

Alongside Reeves, Diaz, Bomer and Hill, the ensemble cast includes Martin Scorsese, Susan Lucci, Laverne Cox, David Spade, Atsuko Okatsuka, Roy Wood Jr., Kaia Gerber, Ivy Wolk and more.

Written by Hill and Ezra Woods, ‚ÄúOutcome‚ÄĚ hails from Apple Studios and is produced by Matt Dines, Alison Goodwin and Hill under their Strong Baby banner, with Adam Merims serving as executive producer.

snippet.description:
Relive the magic of 90s romance with ‚ÄúMile Jo Tere Naina‚ÄĚ from the movie Do Aankhen Barah Hath ūüíę
This evergreen love song features the charming Govinda and captures the essence of pure Bollywood romance ‚Ě§ÔłŹ

ūüé§ Sung by the legendary duo Kumar Sanu & Alka Yagnik, this song is a perfect blend of soulful melody and heartfelt emotions ūüéß‚ú®

ūüé¨ Now presented in stunning 4K quality, enjoy this timeless classic like never before!

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Credits:
Singer(s): Alka Yagnik, Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Bappi Lahiri
Lyricist: Sunil

Movie Cast & Crew:
Producer: Shashee Praboo
Director: Kirti Kumar
Cast: Govinda, Madhuvanti, Rupali, Kiran Kumar, Sadashiv Amrapurkar

Lyrics :
mile jo tere naina humare naina se
chala kaisa jadu puchho ye raina se
palk nahi hoti hai band
hoti hai koi mithi chubhan
palk nahi hoti hai band
hoti hai koi mithi chubhan
kaise main bataau kaise ye
dhadkan hai jiya sathiya o piya o piya
mile jo tere naina humar naina se
chala kaisa jadu puchho ye raina se
dhintana dhintana dhintana
aana aana tu mere pas aana

taswir teri aankho me le lu itane karib aa na
najadik kaise aau main bhala lagta hai dar piya
taswir teri aankho me le lu itane karib aa na
najadik kaise aau main bhala lagta hai dar piya
aise na dekh mujhe tadpata hai jiya sathiya aa aa
mile jo tere naina humare naina se
chala kaisa jadu puchho ye raina se
dhintana dhintana dhintana
aana aana tu mere pas aana

karwat badal badal ke kasm se jagi hu rat bhar
najaro me tum raho agar sanm chahu main umar bhar
karwat badal badal ke kasm se jagi hu rat bhar
najaro me tum raho agar samn chahu main umar bhar
aise na baho me le bahakta ha jiya
o piya aa aa
mile jo tere naina humare naina se
chala kaisa jadu puchho ye raina se
dhintana dhintana dhintana
aana aana tu mere pas aana

MY GAMING CONSOLE COLLECTION
#console #technogamerz #ujjwal 

In this video, I‚Äôm sharing my complete console collection that includes gaming devices from different generations. From classic retro gaming memories to modern high performance systems, this collection shows how gaming has evolved over the years. Some of these are nostalgic pieces that many of us grew up playing, while others represent the latest technology in handheld and console gaming. Watch till the end to see the full collection and let me know which one from this lineup is your favorite.

snippet.title: Champ (Official Video) Vikram Sarkar | Thought | VYRL Haryanvi | Haryanvi Song 2026 | Deepesh Goyal
snippet.description:
Presenting ‚ÄúChamp‚ÄĚ by Vikram Sarkar ‚Äď an upbeat Haryanvi track celebrating hustle, confidence, and the journey of becoming self-made.

#Champ #VikramSarkar #HaryanviMusic 

Audio Credits:

Singer, Lyrics & Composer:  Vikram Sarkar
Music Produced & Mixed by: Thought
Audio Mastering Engineer: Connor Salmural
Recording Engineer and Music Assisted by: VVish

Video Credits:

Director - Deepesh Goyal
DOP - Vikcee
Asst. Directors - Ashish Khomera, Raja, Khyati Sharma
Editor/DI - Bharat Mittal/Deepesh Goyal
Hair & Makeup - Sanju
Design - Vikzee

Lyrics:

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 
Krke dikhaya sala shor na hove 
Nu te hoya na chadi lor na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 

Vip le re se number koe jaali naa
Krya na kaam jipe baji ho tali na 
Khud se bnaya seen kille koi 40 na 
Kam krya se mne raat kri kali na 
Maya bhteri aawe jati smbhali naa 
Busy Schedule bby  baitha m thaali naa 
Yaar ne tere bby Parwah koi sali naa 
Nute bharete par Baat mhare aali naaa 

Itna kamau sala jod na hove 
Pisa white ka sara Re froud na hove 
Bnya na todya jo record na hove 
Chora heer ka yo kise pe afford na hove 

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 

Down to earth chora pal rhya se rete me 
2 number aale kaam krta na bete me 
Paake star the jo balak kai chete me 
Doori bnaio kite aajo lapete me 
Top pe betha chora aate re tower naa 
Chaat pe pool bby lete re shower naa
Dunia hiladyange puch mhari power naa 
Jiki tu fan bby mhare barabar naa 

Din dekhe se made re morod na hove 
Ude na bole jit lod na hove 
Paade se chaale par chod na hove 
Gaadi ude bhjau jit rode na hove 

Khande na maal je pure na hove 
Kariye na call je crore na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove 
Krke dikhaya sala shor na hove 
Nuyte hoya na chdi lor na hove 
Kaam ve kre jika tod na hove 
Tere yaar ki kise pe bby hod na hove

Music release inquiries: contact.vyrlregional@umusic.com

Follow & Subscribe to VYRL Haryanvi:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/profile/vyrlharyanvi?d=n  
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCViPmftRQIxoaVmlAfPTgdQ  


¬©Universal Music India Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: Free fire funnyūüėā  live stream Birju bhai ūüėÜ
snippet.description:
Japan uses piezoelectric tiles to convert footsteps into electrical energy. These tiles capture the kinetic energy generated by your steps. When you walk, your weight and movement apply pressure to the tiles. The tiles bend slightly, creating mechanical stress. The piezoelectric materials inside the tiles convert this stress into electrical energy.
Each step produces a small amount of electric charge, and when millions of steps are combined, they generate enough power to run LED lights, digital displays, and sensors. In busy places like Shibuya Station, around 2.4 million footsteps contribute to this system every day.
This energy can be stored or used immediately, reducing dependence on traditional power sources and supporting sustainable urban infrastructure. This method turns everyday movement into practical renewable energy.

This song captures the playful romance and desi swag of Haryanvi culture. The catchy line ‚ÄúGhuti Dyu Ghuti Dyu Boli He Tatiri‚ÄĚ adds a fun and addictive vibe that makes everyone want to dance and enjoy the rhythm.

With powerful vocals, lively beats, and colorful visuals, TATEEREE is a perfect mix of traditional Haryanvi style and modern music production that will make you listen to it again and again.

If you love Haryanvi songs, desi swag, and energetic beats, this track is made for you.

Is video mein ek emotional aur adventure story hai. Shinchan ghar ka sara kaam karta hai, phir bhi uski mummy use daantti aur maarti rehti hai. Ek din to use khana bhi nahi diya jata aur ghar se bhaga diya jata hai.

Dusri taraf Nobita ki mummy Nobita se bahut pyar karti hai. Tabhi ek din Kamla chudail Nobita ki mummy ko utha kar le jaati hai. Nobita bahut rota hai aur Shinchan se madad maangta hai.

Phir Shinchan aur Nobita milkar ek dangerous mission par jaate hain aur milkar Nobita ki mummy ko chudail se bachate hain.

Kya Shinchan aur Nobita apni mummy ko bacha payenge?
Ye jaanne ke liye video ko end tak zaroor dekho.

Indian Theft Auto Simulator Story
#shinchan #nobita #indianTheftAuto #indiantheftautosimulator #cartoonstory #shinchanstory #nobitastory #cartoonanimation #hindicartoon #gamingstory #emotionalstory

snippet.title: Is Jonathan Leaving GodLike? BGIS 2026 Rumors Explained
snippet.description:
For the past two days, the BGMI esports community has been discussing one big question: Is Jonathan leaving GodLike Esports?

The speculation started during the BGIS 2026 Survival Stage when Jonathan was missing from the GodLike lineup on Day 1. Later, he was also seen leaving the Hyderabad venue, which further fueled rumors across social media.

Many fans assumed that Jonathan had either been dropped from the team or was leaving the organization.

However, the information available so far suggests that this may not be the case.

GodLike Esports co-owner Amar addressed the rumors on March 17, stating that the claims circulating online are baseless and do not reflect reality. He also mentioned that when the right time comes, either Amar, Kronten, or Jonathan himself will properly explain the situation.

Interestingly, Amar also said that the organization still dreams of winning an official trophy with Jonathan, which indicates that the player is still considered an important part of the team.

There was also confusion regarding Jonathan‚Äôs absence from the lineup.

After the matches, GodLike captain Manya clarified that the decision to bench Jonathan was strategic, not due to any internal conflict. In tournaments like BGIS, teams sometimes make tactical lineup changes depending on match situations.

On Day 1 of the Survival Stage, GodLike played with Manya, Admino, Spower, and Godz, and the team actually performed very well, finishing the day at the top of the standings.

Another reason behind the rumors was Jonathan leaving the Sandhya Convention Center in Hyderabad. Reports suggest that he traveled to Mumbai for a scheduled shoot, which likely had been planned earlier as part of brand commitments.

Considering the available information:

‚ÄĘ Amar has called the rumors baseless
‚ÄĘ Manya explained the benching as a strategic decision
‚ÄĘ Jonathan‚Äôs travel appears to be related to a pre-scheduled shoot

All these points suggest that Jonathan leaving GodLike is not confirmed.

With the BGIS 2026 Grand Finals scheduled from March 27‚Äď29 in Chennai, there is still enough time for roster adjustments, and Jonathan could potentially return to the lineup before the finals.
----------------------------------------
Note: This content is our original work and is protected by copyright. Any unauthorized copying, distribution, or use will result in an immediate copyright strike.

Welcome to our Tamil Devotional Channel, your ultimate destination for soulful and uplifting Tamil devotional songs. Dive into the divine with our carefully curated collections designed to inspire and bring peace to your soul every day of the week.

Daily Devotional Songs:
* Monday Tamil Devotional Songs

Special Devotional Collections:
* Shiva Tamil Devotional Songs: Celebrate the power and grace of Lord Shiva.
* Vishnu Tamil Devotional Songs: Immerse in the blessings of Lord Vishnu.
* Muruga Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke the valor and blessings of Lord Muruga.
* Hanuman Tamil Devotional Songs: Feel the strength and devotion of Lord Hanuman.
* Amman Tamil Devotional Songs: Honor the divine mother in her various forms.
* Saibaba Tamil Devotional Songs: Seek the blessings of Shirdi Sai Baba.
* Balaji Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship Lord Venkateswara with these soulful songs.
* Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Attract prosperity with hymns for Goddess Lakshmi.
* Devi Tamil Devotional Songs: Praise the supreme goddess Devi in her many avatars.
* Ganesh Tamil Devotional Songs: Start your day with prayers to Lord Ganesha.

Special Occasions and Deities:
* Amavasai Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs for the new moon day rituals.
* Pradosham Tamil Devotional Songs: Hymns for the auspicious Pradosham period.
* Ashta Lakshmi Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs dedicated to the eight forms of Goddess Lakshmi.
* Vinayagar Tamil Devotional Songs: Devotions for the remover of obstacles, Lord Vinayagar.
* Ganapathi Tamil Devotional Songs: Invoke blessings from Lord Ganapathi.
* Surya Tamil Devotional Songs: Worship the Sun God, Surya, with these melodies.
* Sani Tamil Devotional Songs: Appease Lord Sani with these devotional tracks.
* Guru Tamil Devotional Songs: Songs to honor Guru and seek his wisdom.
* Perumal Tamil Devotional Songs: Devote to Lord Perumal with these spiritual songs.
* Navagraha Tamil Devotional Songs: Balance your energies with songs for the nine planets.

Subscribe now and join our spiritual journey. Like, share, and hit the bell icon to stay updated with our latest devotional uploads. May these divine songs bring peace, prosperity, and positivity to your life.

Dekh Koi Bolo Butterfly

Mope Daanti Si Meense

Sab Din Mope Kaam Karave

Kayko Tu Itni Ghabrave
Aur Lal Kilo Tere Naam Karay Du

Moye Dekh Ke Devar Ek Aankh Te
Photo So Kheenche

Piya Mero Jee So Cho Ghabrave

ŗīÜŗĶľŗīēŗĶÜ ŗīģŗīĺŗīěŗĶćŗīöŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ ŗīĮŗĶĀŗī£ŗĶąŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗī°ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶÜ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ. ŗīĶŗīŅŗī∑ŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīéŗīęŗĶć‚ÄĆŗīłŗīŅ ŗīģŗīĺŗīěŗĶćŗīöŗīłŗĶćŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗĶľ ŗīłŗīŅŗīĪŗĶćŗīĪŗīŅŗīĮŗĶÜ ŗī®ŗīŅŗĶľŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ.

20 ŗī¨ŗīŅŗī≤ŗĶćŗīĮŗĶļ ŗī®ŗīĺŗī£ŗīĮŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗĶĺ ŗīĶŗĶÄŗī§ŗīā, ŗīéŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤ŗīĺ ŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗīĺŗīįŗĶĀŗīā ŗīĶŗīŅŗī™ŗī£ŗīŅŗīĮŗīŅŗĶĹ ŗī®ŗīŅŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶć ŗīĶŗīĺŗīôŗĶćŗīôŗīŅ,

ŗīĶŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī™ŗīĺŗīįŗīā ŗīöŗĶÜŗīĮŗĶćŗīĮŗīĺŗī®ŗīĺŗīĶŗīĺŗī§ŗĶćŗī§ŗīĶ ŗīáŗī≤ŗĶćŗī≤. ŗīÖŗī™ŗĶćŗī™ŗĶčŗĶĺ ŗī®ŗīģŗĶćŗīģŗĶĺ ŗī™ŗīįŗīłŗĶćŗī™ŗīįŗīā ŗīłŗĶćŗīēŗĶćŗīĶŗīĺŗī°ŗĶĀŗīēŗĶĺ ŗīäŗīĻŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ, ŗīēŗī≥ŗīŅŗīēŗĶćŗīēŗĶĀŗī®ŗĶćŗī®ŗĶĀ
